spec.name: Down The Crevasse
spec.description: The crevasse proceeds downward into the dark depths of the earth. The air about you is now cold and quite dry, and your light source gutters in a cool breeze that wafts up from below.

up.description: It is too dark for you to see any further along the crevasse.

down.description: It is too dark for you to see any further along the crevasse.
